servinfo.title: ESP® Hydraulic Unit / Control Module Assembly On-Vehicle Inspection

item.ptxt: Check ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly (1) for dents, crack, deformation and leakage.
Check actuator bracket (2) and its mounting surface for dents, crack and deformation.
Check ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly nuts and actuator bracket bolts for looseness.
Check ESP® control module connector (ESP® control module side and harness side) and its connector lock mechanism for damage or crack.
Check connector terminals for bend, corrosion or rust.

servinfo.ptxt: Repair or replace defective parts if defective.
